caption:
Just another Friday night grading papers... until the air got heavy. 😈

I adjusted my silk blouse, feeling the fabric pull across my chest as I turned to face the quiet office. Only me in the university building, save for the soft hum of the AC. I wore the outfit I picked out that morning: a fitted black blazer over a sheer blouse, tucked into a pencil skirt that hugged every curve of my hips and thighs. My hair was in a messy bun, a few strands escaping to frame my face.

Then the door creaked. It was him, the star of my Advanced Lit course. Eyes locked. The scent of him—leather and coffee—filled the space. He didn't speak. He just looked at me, and I felt a spark ignite in my stomach. I smoothed my skirt, aware of how my legs were crossed, how the skirt hugged my ass. "Late, Elias," I purred, leaning against my desk, letting the blazer slip off my shoulders just an inch. The game was on.

#UniversityTeacher #Professionallife #LateNightGrades #SexyTeacher #Curves #OfficeHours #FrenchVibes #Elegant #InstaTeacher #Alluring
